author: Lily Ray
title: Your GEO Strategy Might Be Destroying Your SEO
content: This piece examines how rapid growth in GEO and SEO strategies can lead to unintended negative consequences. The article discusses a phenomenon referred to as a potential crash or downward spiral that can occur when strategies are implemented too aggressively. The post explores how improper GEO strategy execution may inadvertently damage existing SEO performance and requires multiple years of recovery effort.
